chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1103 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case (Order sent to AAG) 20.06.2018 Raja Abdul Hameed Khaskheli, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Admittedly, alleged detainees are absconders in 12 cases (eleven and one respectively). Hence, allegation of detention is illogical as police can competently arrest them and produce before the competent Court. Accordingly, police officials shall arrest detainees and by taking all steps in pursuance of case of Nasrullah V/S The State reported in P L D 2016 Sindh 238 and produce them before the competent Court of law. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
